gate_summary: Gate 241 — ECG PFX prefetcher vs DROPLET runtime comparison. SCAFFOLD/DEFERRED today. Neither ECG PFX nor DROPLET prefetcher activity counters are populated in any /tmp roi_matrix.csv (only config columns like droplet_indirect_degree, ecg_pfx_delivery, ecg_pfx_hint_filter — all the same value across all rows). When matched-proof sweeps with prefetcher=ecg_pfx and prefetcher=droplet land, this fixture transitions to status=active and the audit compares per-cell L3 miss-rate, useful-prefetch fraction, and issued-prefetch fraction between the two prefetchers on the same baseline.
defer_reason: No runtime prefetcher activity is present in any /tmp/graphbrew-*/roi_matrix.csv corpus today. Audit of all droplet_* and ecg_pfx_* counter columns across {gem5 bracket sweep, sniper grasp sweep, popt geometry matches, dbg ordering proofs} shows only configuration columns (droplet_indirect_degree, droplet_prefetch_degree, droplet_stride_table_size, ecg_pfx_delivery, ecg_pfx_hint_filter) populated and identical across rows; runtime counters (droplet_indirect_issued, droplet_stride_issued, droplet_edge_accesses, ecg_pfx_issued, ecg_pfx_target_hints_seen, etc.) are zero everywhere. Either prefetcher was activated for any of the existing matched sweeps. A future matched-proof comparison sweep with two arms (prefetcher=ecg_pfx, prefetcher=droplet) on the same baseline will activate this gate.
out_of_scope_when_activated: Cross-backend comparison — this gate audits a single backend at a time; cross-backend agreement is locked by gates 238/239/240 separately
Energy/area comparison — not measured in roi_matrix; queued for a separate gate when energy-per-prefetch counters land
